exceptions.summary: Unit 4 is defined in the College Board CED and appears in local product/overview materials, but this repository currently has no local Passwater Unit 4 PDF.
exceptions.plannedHandling: Preserve Unit 4 CED metadata and app-facing labels, mark Unit 4 as locally unsourced for instructional implementation, and do not generate Passwater-derived class-period packages until a local source is provided.

exceptions.summary: Local product and overview language says approximately 54 lessons, while the listed AP topic sequence contains 58 topics.
exceptions.plannedHandling: Use 58 CED topics as the canonical planning count for curriculum-definition artifacts. Update product/runtime wording in a later app-facing cleanup if the team decides to present AP topics as lessons.

exceptions.summary: The official CED and clarification PDFs now have normalized source artifacts under curriculum/source/college-board/.
exceptions.plannedHandling: Future unit/topic source files should consume source/college-board/ced-topic-index.json and reference source/college-board/clarification-guidance.md for errata.

exceptions.summary: Phase 2 normalized the official topic, practice, exam, and FRQ backbone. Full learning-objective and essential-knowledge details still need per-topic source files in Phase 3.
exceptions.plannedHandling: When creating topics/unit-*-topic-*.md, preserve CED learning objectives and essential knowledge with source page references and clarification links.

exceptions.summary: Passwater PDFs are readable and summarized, but diagrams, graphs, formula layout, tables, and embedded worksheet structures require manual review before lesson authoring.
exceptions.plannedHandling: Use the normalized source/passwater/unit-*.md files as planning indexes, then verify graphs, diagrams, and math layout against the original PDFs during class-period and lesson authoring.
